name: Mueang Uthai Thani riverfront civic core
capture_notes: Primary provincial city node covering civic, market, hospital, and everyday urban demand in the Uthai Thani riverfront core.

name: Wat Tha Sung destination band
capture_notes: Strong tourism and destination-charging potential around Wat Tha Sung and adjacent south-city trips. Better suited to destination dwell than pure drive-through charging.

name: Mueang north charger and service band
capture_notes: North side of the city where current competitor evidence and urban demand overlap. Useful for balancing city-center intensity toward the real public-charging catchment.

name: Nong Chang district service axis
capture_notes: District service and hospital-centered demand in Nong Chang. Important for field-planning coverage but should remain below the provincial capital core.

name: Ban Rai-Lan Sak outer service and tourism band
capture_notes: Outer-district service and tourism-support area linking Ban Rai, Lan Sak, and Hup Pa Tat. Include for province screening without overstating remote demand.

name: Hup Pa Tat tourism node
capture_notes: Nature-tourism stop that can create selective destination demand, but should remain weaker than city and district service nodes.
